name: Bytespider
description: ByteDance's web crawler, used to gather training data for its AI models. ByteDance publishes no IP ranges, ASN, or reverse-DNS pattern for it.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 11_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/54.0.3478.1649 Mobile Safari/537.36; Bytespider
